languages.text: {n}Из горла мертвеца доносится уже знакомый вам треск.{/n} "Исключено. Недостаток практических специализаций. Удручающая нехватка инструментария. Особи вроде тебя допустимы в качестве препаратов и источников биологических составов, не слуг".

traits.locale_text: {n}Из горла мертвеца доносится уже знакомый вам треск.{/n} "Исключено. Недостаток практических специализаций. Удручающая нехватка инструментария. Особи вроде тебя допустимы в качестве препаратов и источников биологических составов, не слуг".

{n}Из горла мертвеца доносится уже знакомый вам треск.{/n} "Исключено. Недостаток практических специализаций. Удручающая нехватка инструментария. Особи вроде тебя допустимы в качестве препаратов и источников биологических составов, не слуг".

languages.text: {n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialisation. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."
languages.original_text: {n}Из горла мертвеца доносится уже знакомый вам треск.{/n} "Исключено. Недостаток практических специализаций. Удручающая нехватка инструментария. Особи вроде тебя допустимы в качестве препаратов и источников биологических составов, не слуг".

traits.locale_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialization. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."

{n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialization. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."

{n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialisation. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."

languages.text: {n}Aus der Kehle des toten Mannes ertönt ein bereits bekanntes Knacken.{/n} "Kommt nicht in Frage. Mangel an praktischer Spezialisierung. Frustrierender Mangel an Werkzeugen. Exemplare wie Sie sind nur als Studienproben und Quellen für biologische Verbindungen akzeptabel, nicht als Diener."
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialisation. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."

languages.text: {n}La gorge du mort produit un crépitement déjà familier.{/n} "Hors de question. Manque de spécialisation pratique. Absence frustrante d'outils. Les spécimens comme vous ne sont acceptables qu'en tant qu'échantillons d'étude et sources de composés biologiques, pas en tant que serviteurs."
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialisation. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."

languages.text: {n}死者的喉咙发出熟悉的噼啪声。{/n}"不可能。缺乏实用的专业技术。没有工具，令人沮丧。像你这样的标本只能作为研究样本和生物化合物的来源，而不是仆人。"
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialisation. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."

languages.text: {n}La garganta del muerto produce un crujido ya familiar.{/n} "Imposible. Falta de especialización práctica. Frustrante ausencia de herramientas. Los especímenes como tú sólo son aceptables como muestras de estudio y fuentes de compuestos biológicos, no como sirvientes".
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialisation. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."

languages.text: {n}死んだ男の喉が、すでに聞き慣れたひびきを出す。{/n}「問題外だ。実践的な専門性に欠ける。道具もない。君のような標本は、研究用サンプルや生物学的化合物の供給源としてしか受け入れられず、使用人にはなれない。"
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialisation. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."

languages.text: {n}Ölü adamın boğazından zaten tanıdık gelen bir çatırtı çıkıyor.{/n} "Söz konusu bile olamaz. Pratik uzmanlık eksikliği. Sinir bozucu alet yokluğu. Sizin gibi numuneler yalnızca çalışma numuneleri ve biyolojik bileşik kaynakları olarak kabul edilebilir, hizmetkâr olarak değil."
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces an already familiar crackle.{/n} "Out of the question. Lack of practical specialisation. Frustrating absence of tools. Specimens like you are only acceptable as study samples and sources for biological compounds, not servants."
